title: lastrea squamigera
intro: Lastrea squamigera, also known as the squamigerous lastrea fern, is a type of fern native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Lastrea squamigera include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
